summary: Complete testing of Admin Dashboard (Menu/Tables/Users tabs) and Kitchen Dashboard (prep time display and timer). All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all CRUD operations and timer working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing DialogContent aria-describedby - accessibility issue (non-blocking)

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with role-based redirect to /admin
Backend: Chef login with role-based redirect to /kitchen
Backend: Waiter login with role-based redirect to /waiter
Backend: Menu CRUD - create/update/delete with preparation_time field
Backend: Users CRUD - list/create/update/delete users (admin only)
Backend: Orders with estimated_preparation_time calculated from menu items
Backend: Timer starts (preparation_started_at set) when status changes to in_progress
Backend: Permission checks - waiter cannot delete menu, chef cannot access users
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads correctly with 3 tabs (Menu/Tables/Users)
Frontend: Menu tab shows preparation time for each dish (15 min de préparation)
Frontend: Add menu modal includes 'Temps préparation (min)' field
Frontend: Tables tab shows table number, capacity, and status (Libre/Occupée)
Frontend: Users tab shows user cards with role badges
Frontend: Kitchen dashboard shows orders with dish-level preparation time
Frontend: 'Commencer (15 min)' button displays estimated prep time
Frontend: Clicking 'Commencer' starts countdown timer with progress bar
Frontend: Timer shows remaining time (e.g., '14:59 restant')
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent accessibility warning in console - add aria-describedby to Dialog components
Minor: HTML nesting warning for span inside select/option - caused by dev tools injection, not blocking
seed_data_creation: Test users created via API: admin, chef, waiter with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features tested successfully: 1) Admin redirect works 2) Menu CRUD with prep time works 3) Tables CRUD works 4) Users CRUD works 5) Kitchen shows prep time 6) Timer starts on 'Commencer' click. Test credentials: admin=administration@nassib.com, chef=cuisine@nassib.com, waiter=serveur@nassib.com (all password123)
